company_overview: Maple Street Rods & Collision LLC is a full-service auto body shop based in Strum, WI. The company was founded by an individual with a lifelong passion for cars, who started working on classic cars at a young age and later attended Wyoming's collision and refinishing program. After gaining experience at Scott's Auto Body, they purchased the business and opened Maple Street Rods & Collision LLC in October 2023.

sections: [{"title": "HOME / LANDING", "content": "Maple Street Rods & Collision LLC is a full-service auto body shop able to do all kinds of body work, from repairing your late model vehicle to helping create the custom car or truck of your dreams."}, {"title": "ABOUT", "content": "General — Maple Street Rods & Collision LLC: A brief history and background of the company."}, {"title": "SERVICES", "content": "Our services. Dream it. As part of our services, we can help you plan and design the car or truck of your dreams. We work you every step of the way to fully customize your restoration project. We'll communicate closely with you to ensure that all of your goals are met. Build it. Once we start your project, we'll stay in close communication, via phone, text, or email in order to keep you updated. We can send photo and/or video updates of the progress to make sure that we're meeting your goals. You'll remain the most important member of our team, because at the end of the day, we're building your dream car. Fix it. Along with restorations, we also specialize in collision work, and we can help fix anything ranging from minor fender benders to big collision jobs. We work directly with insurance companies for insurance claims, to get your car back on the road as quickly as possible. Frame pulls We also are capable of doing pulls to your vehicle , weather it be some light body pulls, structural, or even heavy frame pulls. our frame rack has 4, 10 ton rams to get the job done. we even work with other body shops! Claims We work with all insurance companies, and can assist you with your claim to assure you gat your vehicle back on the road as quickly as possible. Loner car If your in need of a loaner vehicle we are able to assist you with that also. we currently have one on sight and will also work with larger rental car services to get keep you on the road while we're fixing your vehicle."}]
